message:
🐛 Move TourProvider to Layout to fix blank login page

Moved TourProvider and tour components from App.tsx to Layout.tsx
so they only render on authenticated routes. This fixes the blank
login page that occurred when TourProvider tried to render during
the login flow.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,8 +14,6 @@ import { DrillDownModal } from './components/drilldown/DrillDownModal'
 import { AuthProvider, useAuth } from './lib/auth'

 import { ToastProvider } from './components/ui/Toast'
-import { TourOverlay, TourPrompt } from './components/onboarding/Tour'
-import { TourProvider } from './hooks/useTour'
 
 function PlaceholderPage({ title, description }: { title: string; description: string }) {
   return (
@@ -63,11 +61,8 @@ function App() {
   return (
     <AuthProvider>
       <ToastProvider>
-      <TourProvider>
       <DrillDownProvider>
       <DrillDownModal />
-      <TourOverlay />
-      <TourPrompt />
       <Routes>
         <Route path="/login" element={<Login />} />
         <Route path="/auth/callback" element={<AuthCallback />} />
@@ -178,7 +173,6 @@ function App() {
         <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/" replace />} />
       </Routes>
       </DrillDownProvider>
-      </TourProvider>
       </ToastProvider>
     </AuthProvider>
   )
